plan_metadata.name: group  create DA Add Action Import Existing API to input url

steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" modal of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "No Action" option from the dropdown menu under "Add an action to your declarative agent" in the "Create Declarative Agent" window of Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Click the "Start with an OpenAPI Description Document" option in the "Create an Action" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Enter OpenAPI Document URL" option in the OpenAPI Spec Document dropdown within the Visual Studio Code extension interface.
